mapper.sql: id, pco_id, pco_item, sub_modelno, sub_qty, remark, version, weight, wait_type, delflag, is_cross, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, relocation
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_pco_item
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_pco_item (id, pco_id, pco_item, sub_modelno, sub_qty, remark, version, weight, wait_type, delflag, is_cross, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, relocation) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pcoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{subModelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{waitType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{isCross,jdbcType=BIT}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{relocation,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into dbo.ops_pco_item
id,
pco_id,
pco_item,
sub_modelno,
sub_qty,
remark,
version,
weight,
wait_type,
delflag,
is_cross,
cre_time,
creator,
modify_time,
modifier,
relocation,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{pcoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{subModelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{subQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{waitType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{isCross,jdbcType=BIT},
#{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{relocation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_pco_item
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
pco_id = #{record.pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pco_item = #{record.pcoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sub_modelno = #{record.subModelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sub_qty = #{record.subQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{record.version,jdbcType=BIGINT},
weight = #{record.weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
wait_type = #{record.waitType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
is_cross = #{record.isCross,jdbcType=BIT},
cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
relocation = #{record.relocation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.ops_pco_item set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, pco_id = #{record.pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pco_item = #{record.pcoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sub_modelno = #{record.subModelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sub_qty = #{record.subQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{record.version,jdbcType=BIGINT}, weight = #{record.weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, wait_type = #{record.waitType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, is_cross = #{record.isCross,jdbcType=BIT}, cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, relocation = #{record.relocation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.ops_pco_item
pco_id = #{pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pco_item = #{pcoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sub_modelno = #{subModelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sub_qty = #{subQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{version,jdbcType=BIGINT},
weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
wait_type = #{waitType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
is_cross = #{isCross,jdbcType=BIT},
cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
relocation = #{relocation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_pco_item set pco_id = #{pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pco_item = #{pcoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sub_modelno = #{subModelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sub_qty = #{subQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{version,jdbcType=BIGINT}, weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, wait_type = #{waitType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, is_cross = #{isCross,jdbcType=BIT}, cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, relocation = #{relocation,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
